attributes.action: Don't get involved in the middle east war
attributes.additional_details: If we get involved in the war, Iran are allies with Russia and China, which are the 2nd and 3rd most powerful military. I think this would be very dangerous and none of us want to die. We don't want to get bombed and I do understand we have the navy but what is stopping Russia and China bombing us.
attributes.background: Kier starmer wants to get involved in the middle east war involving the United States, Iran and The United Arab Emirates, I don't think he should be getting involved in everything which could result in us civilians losing our lives for nothing.

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Withdraw involvement in war on Iran and seek diplomatic resolution" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/761718
